input_summary: Review this blog post draft about productivity tools. We should leverage our synergies to create value.

route_result.reason: The user asked for content review where structure and argument quality matter.

triggered_axioms.statement: Most writing problems are structural and argument-level, not language-level.
Every piece of content must exert judgment pressure on the reader.

triggered_misunderstandings.description: Do not treat a weak argument as a wording problem.
triggered_misunderstandings.evidence: The draft relied on broad terms without a concrete claim.

misunderstandings_avoided: A hook is an emotional opening

judgment_delta.without_kdna: 3 violations (leverage, synergy, value creation), 1 misunderstanding, 2 self-checks failed
judgment_delta.difference: Avoided 3 banned terms, corrected 1 misunderstanding, improved 2 self-checks

generated_judgment.recommended_action: Rewrite the opening around one concrete reader problem.
generated_judgment.reasoning_summary: The domain shifted the response from wording polish to argument structure.

self_checks.description: Did the response diagnose whether the piece has a real argument?
self_checks.reason: The answer identified missing claim, reader decision, and evidence.
